features: High-quality material: The comb is made of premium plastic, and reliable material with good flexibility, lightweight and can withstand heat, designed with ergonomic handle, comfortable to hold in your hands.
Wide teeth design: Designed with wide teeth, which can effectively reduce hair breakage and pulling, the smooth tooth tip provides good protection for the scalp and brings you a pleasant experience.
Suitable size: The size of the hair comb is 16.5 x 6.5 cm (6.5 x 2.56 inch), convenient to carry, takes up little space, store it in your bag or pocket, easy to grasp.

Widely applicable: The hair comb is suitable for most hair types, whether your hair is straight, curly, dry or wet, It can effectively handle knots, perms, and curls, and keep it fluffy, can reduce frizz and help restore dry, damaged hair.
Package includes: You will get 2 black combs, enough to meet your daily hairstyling needs, suitable for adults and kids, hair stylist, barber, also a practical gift to families and friends.
